description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs on force-push. It should have two jobs, linux and windows, each with a matrix strategy for different build configurations. The linux job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with a debian image, while the windows job runs on a windows-2022 environment. Both jobs should install dependencies, check toml.hpp, configure Meson, build, and test.
